--- Air Genasi — Winged Striker --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:16+-2=14 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:18+-2=16 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/3 targets affected.
--- Frost Giant --- HP: 138/138 | AC: 15
REASONING: Throwing rock at Air Genasi — Winged Striker (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:14+9=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Air Genasi — Winged Striker HP: 44/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
